name: tieba-scrape
description: Cross-platform Tieba forum scrape — search dictionary terms on Baidu Tieba, harvest forum threads and replies for evidence
note: INFRASTRUCTURE READY. Full scrape is multi-hour (1576 terms × 5s delays). Python CLIs + JS services + parity comparators verified. Set active:true and run: node server/scripts/runTiebaKeywordScrape.js. Set TIEBA_TRAIN_DICTIONARY=1 to auto-merge evidence.
